hero_description: Computer Engineer | Cybersecurity & Network | Software Developer
aboutDescription1: I am a Computer Engineering graduate with a strong software development background and a focus on cybersecurity and network technologies. I have worked on network systems, firewall technologies, web/API security, vulnerability assessment, container security and Linux-based systems.
aboutDescription2: I have experience in developing web and API-based applications, network-oriented software, scripts, UI/network testing, test automation, and performance/load testing. I have also taken part in testing, validation and development processes on SD-WAN, SDN and SD-Fabric infrastructures.
aboutDescription3: I have worked on web/API security, vulnerability scanning, container security, security validation, test automation and load testing processes using tools such as Burp Suite, Nessus, NeuVector, JMeter and Robot Framework. I have also developed Linux-based network scripts, firewall/network automations and web/NMS applications for device management.
aboutDescription4: I combine cybersecurity, network engineering, network software, software development and testing processes with a technical perspective. I adopt a disciplined, responsible and team-oriented working approach.

resume.experienceData.title: Associate Network Solutions Test Engineer
resume.experienceData.description: Performed UI, network, cybersecurity, load and performance tests on SD-WAN, SDN and SD-Fabric infrastructures. Worked on web/API security, vulnerability scanning, security validation, test automation and load testing processes using Burp Suite, Nessus, NeuVector, JMeter and Robot Framework. Developed 3 internal web applications, firewall/network scripts, and NMS features for SDN/SD-Fabric device management.

resume.experienceData.title: Network Solutions Test Intern
resume.experienceData.description: Worked on SD-WAN, SDN and SD-Fabric infrastructures; developed Linux-based network scripts and web projects for network management.

resume.experienceData.title: IT Support Intern
resume.experienceData.place: Ministry of Labour and Social Security
resume.experienceData.description: Provided hardware and network device support; worked on data mining and machine learning studies using Python.

resume.experienceData.title: Intern Network Developer
resume.experienceData.description: Worked on network systems development, firewall and switch configurations, and OpenWRT-based hardware.

resume.experienceData.title: Junior .NET Developer
resume.experienceData.description: Developed a web-based application using .NET Core and MSSQL. Took an active role within the team.

resume.experienceData.title: IT Support Technician
resume.experienceData.description: Handled hardware installation, maintenance, network infrastructure management and technical support.

resume.experienceData.title: Electrical & Electronics Technician Intern
resume.experienceData.description: Provided installation, maintenance and technical support for electrical and electronics systems.
